action_set_definitions.name: get_current_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the user's current metrics, including affinity scores, fatigue levels, total session watch time, satisfaction index, and the history of recently seen content.

action_set_definitions.name: query_content
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the content library for items based on category and optional tags. Provides metadata for potential impact on state.

tags.description: Optional list of tags to filter by (e.g., ['inoculation']).

action_set_definitions.name: recommend_item
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the recommendation of a content item. This action advances the environment state.

content_id.description: The ID of the content to be served.

state_description.user_affinity_scores: A mapping of content categories to interest levels (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.fatigue_levels: Counter for how many times a category has been shown recently, affecting future click probability.
state_description.session_watch_time_total: Cumulative watch time in seconds for the current session.
state_description.user_satisfaction_index: Overall satisfaction score (0.0 to 1.0), determining session exit probability.
state_description.last_seen_ids: A list of the last 10 content IDs shown to prevent immediate re-recommendation.
